full_text:
S246 pOme

Sample was dissociated in 20 ml of AdF++ containing Dispase and DNase according to the protocol.

Final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of the culture medicum

Cell count /ml

1). Total cells: 9.8 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 5.5 x 106 /mL

Viability: 50.2%

Average size: 7.6 um

2). Total cells: 9.9 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 5.6 x 106 /mL

Viability: 57%

Average size: 7.2 um

Average of two counts: 9.8 x 106 /mL

Total cell count: 9.8 x 106 / ml

A) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

55 wells x 40 µl = 2200 µl,

1000 cells/µl = 2.2*E6 cells

Divide them into two tubes of 1100 ul

→ take 100 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 1.1*E6 cells into two tubes, proceed with the omentum gel mix as below.

→ make 1100 ul of omentum gel mix in 1.5ml eppendorf

cells → 100 ul

culture medium→ 821ul

ome-gel → 155 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

Fibrinogen → 18

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL organoid culture medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 50 uL to make up to 350 uL per well

B) 96-well U plate

9 conditions x 4 wells/condition= 36 wells

36 wells x 10 µl = 384 µl → make 360 µl

1000 cells/µl = 3.6*E5 cells

→ take 36 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 3.5*E5 cells, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

cells → 36 ul

medium → 263ul

ome-gel → 51 µl

aprotinin → 1.2 µl

thrombin → 1.2 µl

fibrinogen → 7.2 µl

NOTE: 10ul per well is too much for a 96-flat bottom plate, it does not sit as a bubble. So 6 ul per well was plated instead of 10. Remaining mixture was plated as extra wells.

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 150 uL medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 25 uL to make up to 175 uL per well

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 200 ul of cell suspension corresponding to 1.0 *E6 cells for flow antibody staining for functional markers and unstained control

→

Pellet the above cell suspension @400g, +4 for 6 min. Resuspend the pellet in 900ul of FACS buffer, proceed with the staining.

E) Sample for cryo

5*E6 cells were frozen in stem cell banker X 1 vial

FACS staining was performed for d0 pOme samples according to the protocol with overnight storing of cell pellet in FACS staining buffer after primary ab staining followed by fixation and permeabilization. In addition, d0 unstained cells of the same samples as well as new compensation was run at the same time.

There were not much of cancer cell clusters and the cells did not look healthy! so did not continue with further experiment for drug treatment / flow cytometry.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
